remember: Recall the different types of electoral systems used in various countries.
Explain the concept of representative democracy and its significance in modern politics.
Identify the key features of the electoral system in India.
understand: Understand the role of electoral systems in shaping the political landscape of a country.
Explain how the concept of representation is linked to the idea of democracy.
Analyze the impact of electoral reforms on the functioning of democratic institutions.
apply: Apply the concept of proportional representation to a given scenario.
Use examples to explain the differences between first-past-the-post and proportional representation systems.
Evaluate the effectiveness of the electoral system in ensuring representation of diverse groups.
analyze: Analyze the relationship between electoral systems and the representation of minorities.
Examine the impact of electoral reforms on the empowerment of marginalized groups.
Compare and contrast the electoral systems of different countries to identify best practices.

ncert_objectives: As per NCERT objective 1: Understand the concept of representation and its significance in democratic politics.
As per NCERT objective 2: Explain the types of electoral systems and their characteristics.
As per NCERT objective 3: Analyze the impact of electoral reforms on the functioning of democratic institutions.
board_exam_objectives: Describe the electoral system in India and its key features.
Explain the concept of representative democracy and its significance in modern politics.
Compare and contrast the electoral systems of different countries.
